summary: Iteration 64: Dashboard Stats Enhancement Tests - 9/9 tests PASSED (100%). Verified enhanced /api/dashboard/stats endpoint returns correct data for all 3 roles: Student (total, pending, approved, completed, pipeline), Supervisor (pending_my_approval, pipeline), InCharge (pending_my_approval, student_stats, pipeline). Regression tests confirmed Phase 1 approval, Phase 2 approval with comments, and bone graft data all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats endpoint correctly returns role-specific data
Student role: gets total, pending, approved, rejected, drafts, completed, pipeline (no pending_my_approval or student_stats)
Supervisor role: gets all base fields + pending_my_approval (no student_stats)
InCharge/Admin role: gets all base fields + pending_my_approval + student_stats array
Pipeline structure includes phase1, phase2, phase3, phase4, completed, rejected counts
student_stats array contains: student_name, total, completed, rejected, active per student
GET /api/procedures works for all 3 roles (no regression)
Phase 1 approval flow works end-to-end (no regression)
Phase 2 approval with comment saves phase2_supervisor_notes and phase2_incharge_notes (no regression)
Bone graft data (bone_graft_used, bone_graft_details) saves correctly in phase2_data (no regression)
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix during testing and cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard stats endpoint verified for all 3 roles. Student gets base stats + pipeline. Supervisor gets base stats + pipeline + pending_my_approval. InCharge/Admin gets base stats + pipeline + pending_my_approval + student_stats array. All regression tests passed for Phase 1 approval, Phase 2 approval with comments, and bone graft data.

tested_features.dashboard_stats_student_structure: PASS - Returns total, pending, approved, rejected, drafts, completed, pipeline
tested_features.dashboard_stats_incharge_structure: PASS - Returns base fields + pending_my_approval + student_stats
tested_features.phase1_approval_flow_regression: PASS - Full Phase 1 approval flow works
tested_features.phase2_approval_with_comment_and_bone_gr: PASS - Phase 2 with bone graft and comments works

tested_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - Returns access_token and refresh_token for all 3 roles
tested_endpoints.GET /api/dashboard/stats (student): 200 - Returns total, pending, approved, rejected, drafts, completed, pipeline
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2: 200 - Saves bone_graft_used and bone_graft_details in phase2_data
